name: Medable
description: Decentralized clinical trial platform with eCOA, eConsent, telemedicine and connected-device APIs for sponsors and CROs.

seo.title: Medable — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Medable: Decentralized clinical trial platform with eCOA, eConsent, telemedicine and connected-device APIs for sponsors and CROs.

when_to_use: Decentralized clinical trial eCOA and eConsent via API
Remote patient monitoring for sponsor and CRO applications
Telemedicine SDK for digital health clinical research tools
Connected device data aggregation for clinical endpoints
FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliant digital health trial platform

review.verdict: Specialized DCT platform that saves pharma teams time, irrelevant outside clinical trials.
review.best_for: Pharma sponsors and CROs running decentralized clinical trials needing compliant tooling
review.not_for: Any non-clinical use case or budget-sensitive healthcare startups

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
